! Total: 6
! Breakdown: service_rules=6

! Disney+
! Purpose: service-specific routing for proxy tools.
! This is NOT a blocking list.

||disneyplus.com^                         ! Disney+ - main platform
||disney-plus.net^                        ! Disney+ - delivery network
||bamgrid.com^                            ! Disney+ - BAMTech media grid
||dssott.com^                             ! Disney+ - streaming delivery
||disney.io^                              ! Disney - internal services
||registerdisney.go.com^                  ! Disney - account services
